h02eb04ffg140ag4913g8139g48eadf127080: Stay put, and keep your lips sealed.
h9b8730e4gc449g4b4ag8fa1g788bd242eca7: You. Stay put, and keep your lips sealed.
h4e78d904ge8beg453cg9633g09d87f7422ee: *Your skull pounds in response to the githyanki's white-hot stare. Her lips don't move, yet you hear her voice.*
h859661e3g9448g462egab71gb2a46d3183a5: You. Stay put, and keep your lips sealed.
h9711a3b2g29f1g4f7ag9642g1d5ebd3fc0b5: Rider - my time is short. Lead me to...
h2364a059geff4g41e9ga228gfdd603b0fb58: Were I not merciful, I would slice the skin clean from your meat.
h79998b9cgf407g48c8g875dgc51118edd4eb: Yet you are not bleeding. For I am nothing if not merciful.
hab056fbcgae85g4d92g9528g3c18e3eeb409: A ghaik vessel has fallen from the sky, Lae'zel. Thieves aboard have taken a weapon most precious.
h066af15fg8b8ag45c9ga031gbfcc5703293f: It is polyhedric in shape, and inscripted with the sacred runes of our people.
h09fafb57gb9e0g4879g9099g06afaa4c7feb: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks is the same one the Absolute's followers are hunting - it's the artefact that she carries.*
h026fe480gdc35g440cg89cegbd7f3a7b0faf: *Her mind focuses - the giths' suspicion cannot be aroused. They cannot discover that the weapon they seek is right within their grasp.*
h1dfaa3a0g9c42g47fdgb68dgb78bb6ed0b23: Take word to your crèche. You are to join our search.
hbd5b4dd7gf336g4422gb852ga2b6c3865b46: Speak up, child. Affirm your mandate.
hb1643d6dg78d4g44f4g8bb1g8782b3b21d22: Chk. My mandate - honoured Kith'rak - is to locate this crèche. I was infected aboard a ghaik ship and need to be purified. Your mandate is to aid me.
h0e31a31eg159cg4732g921bgbe9f76faf5ab: Purified? Oh, Lae'zel - why must the truth be so bitter? Soon, your skin will go grey, and your blood will run silver. You will shed your skin to become ghaik.
hc362c6eegbbb4g4a1cg9911g3dc5503de78f: Only in death are the infected cleansed.
hf9c933f1gc7a2g44cegbea3g74789be7cbb2: But... you were on the nautiloid. You possess what I seek.
h46cd142ag8922g46c0g96f6g4fa3e06c3739: You will give it to me. Then you will bend your head for my sword.
haba20da0g812cg45c0gaa03gbd6d73440049: Stand down, knight. I do not have what you seek!
h47f44856g2810g42ffg9f78g08b978a3dd47: Baretha - see her skull split and her corpse examined, on Vlaakith's command.
h0e468208g068cg47e8gb685g795fc1180b82: Produce the artefact. You're looking for this, I take it?
h0809ae92g0671g47b8g92a9gcd9aa9d46935: Our thieves come forth, Baretha. Did you imagine such fortune?
h63ea47f0gfdf5g4e2dgab30g3cc5a88ccf05: You will give me the weapon. Then you will bend your head for my sword.
hff765959gbb60g4140gb7e4gf41ee4973700: Never. Vlaakith demands my purity, Kith'rak. I was infected aboard the ghaik ship. By protocol, you must aid me.
hded92ab6g2ec2g409cgb811g4816b29c052c: Baretha - see that her skull is split and the weapon collected, on Vlaakith's command.
h442dac61g9064g4fd5g81fdge3905b6b608e: I have my own mandate. Time to die, gith.
h0c53fb9ag85feg4ce4gb42fg869a25734313: What? Halfwit! I have not suffered for you to deny me!
he1dd6dddg1a35g435fga39bg8249b33e1a28: Baretha - see their skulls split and their corpses examined, on Vlaakith's command.
h7b686c7dg7a74g4a1ag92f3g3908e99254f7: *You feel Shadowheart's anxiety. The weapon that Voss seeks - it's the artefact that she carries.*
hf5866e36g6940g4cb3ga058g53bf50279ab2: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You must keep it from him, same as you must keep it from the Absolute.*
h5f3b88c6gf42fg47b0g90f8g860dfd072843: *You realise that the weapon Voss speaks of is the gith artefact you carry. You cannot let him discover it - not matter what.*
h85d3331eg2074g44a7gbd93g6f2f3d1d1ba7: *You suddenly feel a strange anxiety take hold - not your own, but that of the artefact you carry. Somehow, it's afraid...*
hf40c6411ge3fag44fcga4cfg6943f6f4de5a: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands any more than it does the Absolute followers'.*
he1dfd964g3a80g4db2ga0c9g4172bb809159: *You attune your mind to it. The artefact does not not want to part from you. It does not want to fall into the gith raiders' hands.*
ha0ba9bd7gfeccg4b74g9566g84e1e8e5c9b5: If you wish to speak, speak to me.
h7ddc16ffgea7fg48b8gbf6dg7c3b0f6703f6: Step forward and state your own name.
he302d6c8gde51g451dga1a6gcf6283752eef: Now, now - Vlaakith esteems all her children.
